title: Quest Smokeless Electric BBQ Grill – 2300 W Table‑Top Indoor Grill with Adjustable Thermostat, Cool‑Touch Panel, 36 × 24 cm Plate
features: INDOOR ELECTRIC GRILL – Enjoy tasty grilled food at any time of the year with this Electric Indoor BBQ Grill. It features a 36.5cm x 24.5cm sized grill grate, allowing you plenty of space to grill meats, burgers, vegetables, skewers, and more. British Safety Standards - UK plug & CE‑tested heating element.

REDUCED SMOKE – Designed with a water reservoir underneath the grill, this BBQ produces much less smoke and odour than a regular grill. This is especially helpful for grilling indoors, or in places with less ventilation. The reservoir also functions as a drip tray, making cleaning easier.

EASY OPERATION – Change the temperature of the grill via the thermostatic dial on the front, allowing you to precisely adjust the grill to your food’s needs. A helpful indicator light is included so you know when the grill is active, and it also features an automatic cut-off for safety.

CLEAN & CONVENIENT – The chrome plated grill is easy to remove and wipe clean once cooking is done, and the flame-less style of grilling means no residue is left behind. The control panel is also cool touch, helping to ensure your safety during use. The grill measures 46 x 39 x 10cm in total.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Minimal Smoke for Indoor Use Electric BBQ Grill Enjoy all kinds of grilled food at any time of the year with this Electric Indoor BBQ Grill. Designed with a water reservoir underneath the grill, this flameless cooker produces much less smoke and odour than a regular grill, and also avoids leaving residue behind. The water reservoir functions as a drip tray, and combined with the chrome plated grill, this means cleaning is easy. Previous page Spacious Indoor Grill The grill grate measures 36.5 x 24.5cm, making it ideal for cooking up BBQ meals even on rainy days. Reduces Smoke Designed with a water reservoir under the grill, the electric BBQ produces much less smoke & odour. Delicious BBQ Taste Even with electrically powered cooking, the grill style ensures the same classic barbecue taste. Temperature Control The grill's thermostatic dial allows you to adjust its temperature easily and precisely. Easy Cleaning The chrome plated grill is easy to remove for cleaning purposes, as is the drip tray and other parts Next page 1 Spacious Indoor Grill 2 Reduces Smoke 3 Delicious BBQ Taste 4 Temperature Control 5 Easy Cleaning

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Adjustable Thermostat, Flameless Grill, Heat-Resistant Handle, Portable, Smokeless
